title: Mineclub Expanded [DISCONTINUED]
description: QoL mod for the minecraft server "mineclub"
body:
**This mod has been discontinued because the server is now shut down. This mod is no longer being maintained**




This is a Client-Side QoL Mod for the server "Mineclub"

Here's the Server Address for mineclub if you need it: `play.mineclub.com`

**Also to note, Everything within the mod is disabled by default, to enable it you need to access its config file. Go [here](https://github.com/Blobanium/mineclub-expanded/wiki/FAQ#how-do-i-get-to-the-configuration-menu "") if you need help going to the configuration file** 

Requires fabric API

## Mod Features 

**Discord Rich Presence**: Self-Explanatory (Preview of that in the image below)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/820817211793866793/916137517886095390/unknown.png)

**Outbid "Notifier"**: Plays a noise every time you get outbid (Useful to those who are farming for Market interest)

**Auto GG**: Makes you say GG at the end of the game (Similar to other mods, Like mods made for Hypixel.) 
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/820817211793866793/916147567769833522/unknown.png)

And much more to come!
